kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Exactly two of (the members of the Market Ward, the artisan serving the Knight, and the artisan who makes Candles) belong to the Ironmongers' Guild.
Either 10 coins goes with Matilda or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Matilda (but not both).
Exactly two of the artisan who makes Boots, the artisan who makes Candles, the artisan serving the Baron, and the artisan with 11 coins belong to the Market Ward.
Earl goes with exactly four of Edmund, Mason, Barrels, Kingsford, and 11 coins.
The artisan serving the Knight's levy is higher than both the artisan who makes Boots and the artisan in Millpond.
If Weaver goes with Duke, then Southgate does not go with Rope.
Either Matilda goes with 8 coins, or Blacksmith goes with Baron — but not both.
At most one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the Market Ward.
Between Matilda and Rowan, one goes with Cooper and the other with Weaver.
Edmund's levy is between the artisan who makes Boots and the Mason.
Duke goes with at least two of Rowan, Blacksmith, Boots, and 9 coins.
Edmund goes with either Rope or 11 coins (but not both).

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Exactly two of (the members of the North Watershed, the angler fishing with Nightcrawler, and the angler using the Spoon) belong to the Sunfish Family.
Either 6 lb goes with Mabel or someone in the Pike Family goes with Mabel (but not both).
Exactly two of the angler using the Spinnerbait, the angler using the Spoon, the angler fishing with Corn, and the catch with 8 lb belong to the North Watershed.
Maggot goes with exactly four of Esther, Pike, Popper, Birchpool, and 8 lb.
The angler fishing with Nightcrawler's weight is higher than both the angler using the Spinnerbait and the angler at Foxglen.
If Trout goes with Dough, then Willowmere does not go with Swimbait.
Either Mabel goes with 2 lb, or Bass goes with Corn — but not both.
At most one member of the Sunfish Family is in the North Watershed.
Between Mabel and Wade, one goes with Catfish and the other with Trout.
Esther's weight is between the angler using the Spinnerbait and the angler who landed the Pike.
Dough goes with at least two of Wade, Bass, Spinnerbait, and 4 lb.
Esther goes with either Swimbait or 8 lb (but not both).
